meta.name: Alex Rivera
meta.bio: I'm a passionate developer who loves crafting digital experiences that blend creativity with cutting-edge technology.

about.headline: About Me
about.description:
I'm a Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and immersive digital experiences. My journey started with a curiosity for how things work on the internet, and it evolved into a career I'm deeply passionate about.

I specialize in React, Node.js, and cloud architecture, but I'm always eager to explore new technologies. When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects or mentoring junior developers.

education.description: Specialized in Artificial Intelligence and Distributed Systems. Dean's List for 3 consecutive years.
Intensive 6-month program covering modern web development, agile methodologies, and project-based learning.
Advanced Placement in Mathematics and Computer Science. Led the school's robotics club to state championships.

projects.title: NeuralChat AI
projects.description: A real-time AI-powered chat platform with multi-modal capabilities, supporting text, image, and voice interactions using OpenAI APIs.

projects.title: CryptoTracker Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time cryptocurrency portfolio tracker with advanced analytics, price alerts, and multi-exchange integration.

projects.title: EcoRoute
projects.description: A sustainable travel planner that calculates carbon footprint for different travel modes and suggests eco-friendly alternatives.

projects.title: DevCollab
projects.description: Real-time collaborative code editor with video calls, whiteboard, and AI-powered code suggestions for remote teams.

internships.description: Worked on the Google Maps team to optimize routing algorithms, reducing computation time by 23%. Collaborated with senior engineers on large-scale distributed systems.
Built internal developer tools and contributed to the Stripe Dashboard redesign. Improved page load performance by 40% through code splitting and lazy loading.
Automated CI/CD pipelines and built monitoring dashboards for deployment health. Reduced deployment failures by 35% through improved testing frameworks.

certificates.title: AWS Solutions Architect
certificates.description: Professional level certification validating expertise in designing distributed applications and systems on the AWS platform.

certificates.title: Google Cloud Professional
certificates.description: Demonstrates ability to design, develop, and manage GCP solutions including robust, secure, scalable, and dynamic solutions.

certificates.title: Meta React Developer
certificates.description: Comprehensive certification covering React fundamentals, hooks, state management, testing, and advanced patterns.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.description: Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hello — my inbox is always open. I'll get back to you as soon as possible!
